title: 3 Legal Considerations
body_text:
3	Legal Considerations
3.1	Restricted Entities
Financial institutions must exercise enhanced due diligence to identify restricted entities when processing applications from new billers. While due diligence is ultimately the financial institutionâs responsibility, Central 1 reserves the right to further investigate restricted entities and may decline to provide services to entities deemed to be outside of Central 1âs risk appetite. Central 1 may make inquiries on specific transactions and ask for the results of the financial institutionâs enhanced due diligence efforts.
END
